finding_details.summary: Closed domain 'ConnectionBannerState' is missing coverage for variants: connecting, reconnecting, restoring
finding_details.impact: Finite-domain changes can silently miss one surface unless all required cases stay in sync.
inspection_focus: inspect which required surfaces should change together and add explicit coverage there

finding_details.summary: Composition root 'src/App.tsx' depends on 32 real surfaces, above the typescript threshold of 15
finding_details.impact: Broad dependency fan-out in a composition root makes shell wiring and runtime ownership harder to keep separate.
inspection_focus: inspect whether view composition can stay separate from runtime or session wiring
inspect whether shell responsibilities are spreading across too many direct imports

finding_details.summary: File 'src/components/TaskPanel.tsx' depends on 28 real surfaces, above the typescript threshold of 15
finding_details.impact: Broad dependency fan-out expands change surface and makes orchestration drift harder to localize.
inspection_focus: inspect whether orchestration and policy code can move behind narrower helpers
inspect whether unrelated adapter dependencies are accumulating in one module

finding_details.summary: Component-facing barrel 'src/store/store.ts' has 47 inbound references and remains unstable
finding_details.impact: A volatile component-facing barrel makes it harder to keep presentation access broad while keeping deeper orchestration changes contained.
inspection_focus: inspect which component-facing reads really need the shared barrel and which can move behind narrower selectors
inspect whether broad inbound traffic is hiding a smaller set of volatility-heavy owner modules
